nav.notes_desc: Capture ideas with rich text and tags

hero.subtitle: Notes, tasks, calendar, and projects — beautifully designed to keep you focused and productive. No noise, just what matters.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed to keep your life organized
features.notes_desc: Capture ideas instantly with rich text, tags, and bookmarks. Search, filter, and organize — never lose a thought again.
features.tasks_desc: Organize tasks by priority, due date, and projects. Smart filters, drag-to-reorder, and completion tracking keep you on top of everything.
features.calendar_desc: Events and meetings in one unified view. See your day, week, or month at a glance — never miss an important date.
features.projects_desc: Group your tasks and notes into projects. Track progress, set deadlines, and keep everything in context.

cards.security_desc: Your data is encrypted end-to-end. We never sell your information. Your notes, tasks, and events stay private — always.
cards.offline_desc: No internet? No problem. Nooks works seamlessly offline and syncs automatically when you're back online.
cards.ai_desc: Get smart suggestions, auto-categorization, and writing help powered by AI. Available with the Pro plan.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in three simple steps
howItWorks.step1_desc: Get the app and create your free account in seconds. No credit card required.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Add notes, create tasks, and schedule events — all from one beautifully designed interface.
howItWorks.step3_desc: Track your progress, hit your goals, and build better habits day after day.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Nooks

items.a: Yes. The free plan includes up to 50 notes per month, 20 events, 1 project, and end-to-end encryption. No credit card required.

items.q: How does the AI assistant work?
items.a: The AI assistant helps you organize notes, suggests task priorities, summarizes meetings, and extracts action items. It runs privately via Ollama.
Absolutely. Nooks works fully offline. All your data is stored locally and syncs automatically when you reconnect.
Security is our priority. All data is encrypted end-to-end. We never sell or share your personal information.

items.q: Can I switch plans at any time?
items.a: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade whenever you want. Pro features are available immediately on upgrade.

items.q: What platforms is Nooks available on?
items.a: Nooks is available on iOS and Android. A web version is coming soon.

cta.title: Ready to get organized?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of people who use Nooks to stay on top of their day.

feature_pages.cta_desc: Download Nooks and start organizing your work today.

notes.title:
Notes that work
for you.
notes.subtitle: Capture ideas instantly with rich text, tags, bookmarks, and powerful search. Your thoughts, organized and always accessible.

feature_cards.title: Rich Text Editor
feature_cards.desc: Format your thoughts with bold, italic, lists, and more. Word count and reading time included.

feature_cards.title: Tags & Bookmarks
feature_cards.desc: Organize with custom tags. Mark notes as important or bookmark them for quick access.

feature_cards.title: Powerful Search
feature_cards.desc: Find anything by title, content, or tags. Filter by date range to narrow results instantly.

tasks.title: Tasks, mastered.
tasks.subtitle: From quick to-dos to complex project workflows. Priority levels, due dates, smart filters, and time tracking keep you in control.
tasks.detail_desc: Everything about a task in one view. Priority, due date, project, linked events, time tracking, and client visibility — all at a glance.
tasks.timer_desc: Start and stop timers directly from any task. Track billable hours per project and see exactly where your time goes.

feature_cards.title: Smart Filters
feature_cards.desc: Instantly filter by All, Today, Pending, or Completed. Find any task in seconds.

feature_cards.title: Drag to Reorder
feature_cards.desc: Reorder tasks with drag and drop. Your custom order is saved and synced across devices.

feature_cards.title: Project Linking
feature_cards.desc: Connect tasks to projects and events. Everything stays in context, never isolated.

feature_cards.title: Time Tracking
feature_cards.desc: One-tap timer on every task. Track hours, see totals, and monitor billable time per project.

tasks.connected_desc: Link tasks to projects, associate them with calendar events, and track completion across your entire workflow.

projects.title:
Projects,
your way.
projects.subtitle: Kanban boards, client management, billing, templates, sharing, and status tracking. Everything to manage professional work from start to finish.
projects.detail_desc: Open any project and see the full picture: status, client, billing, deadlines, and all linked content. Kanban board included.
projects.client_desc: Store name, email, phone, and company. Share project progress with clients through a secure link and QR code.
projects.billing_desc: Set hourly rates, estimated hours, and budgets per project. Track deadlines and monitor spend in real time.
projects.share_desc: Generate a secure link or QR code. Only tasks and notes marked as visible will be shown to the client.

feature_cards.title: Kanban Board
feature_cards.desc: 4 columns: To Do, Notes, Events, and Done. Drag to reorder tasks within each column.

feature_cards.title: Client Info
feature_cards.desc: Store contact details, company name, and communication history in every project.

feature_cards.title: Billing Tracking
feature_cards.desc: Hourly rates, budgets, estimated hours, and deadline alerts — all built in.

feature_cards.title: Secure Sharing
feature_cards.desc: Share project progress via link or QR code. Control exactly what clients can see.

calendar.title:
Your time,
visualized.
calendar.subtitle: Month, week, and day views with event categories, recurrence, reminders, and Google Calendar integration.

feature_cards.title: Recurring Events
feature_cards.desc: Set daily, weekly, or monthly recurrence with an end date. Never re-create the same event.

feature_cards.title: Smart Reminders
feature_cards.desc: Get notified before events start. Customize reminder timing per event.

feature_cards.title: Google Calendar
feature_cards.desc: Sync your Google Calendar events seamlessly. See everything in one unified view.

feature_cards.title: Location & Cost
feature_cards.desc: Add location and cost tracking to any event. Know where you need to be and what it costs.

calendar.google_desc: Import all your Google Calendar events. See work, personal, and shared calendars in one unified timeline.

ai.title:
AI that understands
your work.
ai.subtitle: Meeting summaries, entity extraction, and smart action proposals. Powered by Ollama for complete privacy.
ai.chat_user_msg: What should I focus on today?

chat_ai_sections.heading: High Priority
items: Review Q3 budget proposal — deadline tomorrow
Reply to client email from Acme Corp

chat_ai_sections.heading: Suggested
items: Finish draft for blog post (70% done)

ai.chat_ai_summary: You have 2 urgent tasks and 2 meetings today. I'd recommend starting with the budget proposal.
ai.privacy_desc: Nooks AI runs through Ollama on your device. No data leaves your phone. No cloud processing. Complete privacy by design.

beta.subtitle: Nooks is in active development. Join the beta to get early access, help us improve, and shape the features you need most.

roadmap.title: MVP — Core productivity
items: Notes, tasks, projects, and calendar fully functional

beta.cta_subtitle: Be among the first to try Nooks and help shape its future. Free during the beta period.
